name: Pesto Chicken Pizza
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup Grated Mozzarella Cheese (more or less to taste)
1/2 Cup Sun-dried Tomatoes (in oil or not)
1 Can Pillsbury Pizza-Crust from dairy section
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate chicken breast in your favorite Italian-style dressing for several hours.
2. Grill outside until 3/4 done, or bake in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
3. Place half cup sun-dried tomatoes in a 1-cup container. Fill with boiling water and set aside for 10-15 minutes.
4. Chop chicken into bite-sized pieces. Cover and set aside.
5. When the sun-dried tomatoes have reconstituted, chop coarsely (at least chop each tomato in half).
6. Prepare pizza dough. Spread pesto sauce to about 1/3 inch from edge of crust. Brush surface with olive oil if desired.
7. Strategically place chopped chicken and sundried tomatoes over the pesto.
8. Sprinkle half of the mushrooms on top.
9. Cover with cheese.
10. Sprinkle remaining mushrooms on top of the cheese.
11. Bake at 375°F until crust is golden and cheese is bubbly and beginning to turn golden.
12. Do not initially overbake chicken, or you will have bite-sized pieces of leather on your pizza.
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
NOTES: Here's my favorite "white" pizza recipe.
